subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Merciful! Adorn the gathering of fellowship with the remembrance of that tender Beloved in such wise that it may become a feast of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن محفل انس را بذکر آندلبر مهربان چنان بیارااید که بزم میثاق گردد و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
